title: K.S. Leow Group | Business & Tech Solutions in Malaysia
description: We offer comprehensive business solutions: auditing, tax, secretarial, IT hardware, and accounting & POS software support & training.

title: AutoCount Accounting 2.2
description: Desktop accounting software for Malaysian SMEs with SST, e‑Invoice, inventory, sales, purchase, and reporting workflows.

title: AutoCount CloudAccounting
description: Browser‑based AutoCount CloudAccounting with e‑Invoice, AI SmartScan, bank connection, and anytime access.

title: AutoCount POS Malaysia
description: AutoCount POS Malaysia for retail, F&B, and branch outlets, integrated with AutoCount Accounting, stock control, receipt printers, barcode scanners, and local implementation support.

title: FeedMe POS
description: Cloud F&B POS for restaurants with table management, kitchen display, and online ordering integration.

title: AutoCount Plugin
description: AutoCount Accounting plugin collection including KSL-built plugins and selected dealer plugins.

title: Sales2DO AutoCount Plugin
description: Sales2DO copies Invoice or Cash Sale documents to Delivery Order with outstanding quantity checking and delivery workflow controls.

title: KS Omni AI Assistant
description: K.S. Leow Group AI Assistant for web chat, WhatsApp handoff, document/image support, quotation workflows, and customer self-service.

title: Quotation PDF Viewer
description: Secure quotation link viewer for official PDF quotations generated by KS Omni.

title: Company Gallery
description: K.S. Leow Group activity and team building photo gallery for company events, training days, celebrations, and team moments.
